metadata.description: SQL interface to bpy.data — drive Blender from a coding agent over SQL

plugins.name: blendersql
plugins.description: SQL interface to bpy.data: a comprehensive SQLite virtual-table surface over bpy.data plus typed verbs and escape-hatch SQL functions, for querying and editing scenes, grease pencil, meshes, materials, animation, modifiers, VSE, and assets in a running Blender
